detected_errors.issue_explanation: The date layout string violates explicit German target locale criteria. In Germany, dates must strictly use dot separators (DD.MM.YYYY) instead of forward slashes.

detected_errors.issue_explanation: Severe homonym mistranslation. In this clear sports context, 'Calcio' means football (soccer), but the engine translated it as the chemical element Calcium ('Kalzium'), catastrophically breaking user trust.

detected_errors.source_text_snippet: A Modena potrai ascoltare il rombo dei motori dei bolidi del Cavallino Rampante
detected_errors.target_text_snippet: In Modena können Sie dem Brüllen der Motoren der Rennwagen des Tänzelnden Ponys lauschen
detected_errors.issue_explanation: Severe brand degradation. 'Cavallino Rampante' refers to Ferrari's iconic luxury brand emblem. Translating it literally as 'Tänzelndes Pony' (Prancing Pony) sounds childish and unprofessional.
detected_errors.suggested_fix: In Modena können Sie dem Aufheulen der Motoren der Boliden des 'Cavallino Rampante' lauschen

detected_errors.source_text_snippet: maestri presepiali modellano a mano pastori in terracotta
detected_errors.target_text_snippet: Krippenmeister Hirten aus gekochter Erde von Hand modellieren
detected_errors.issue_explanation: Highly unnatural literal translation. 'Terracotta' is an established loanword in German, whereas 'gekochte Erde' literally means 'cooked earth/soil', creating an absurd and incorrect description.
detected_errors.suggested_fix: Krippenmeister Hirtenfiguren aus Terrakotta von Hand modellieren

detected_errors.source_text_snippet: Vivi la storica rivalità tra le Contrade, cammina tra i rioni medievali in festa e assisti alla leggendaria corsa dei barberi
detected_errors.target_text_snippet: Leben Sie die historische Rivalität zwischen den Laden-Bezirken, gehen Sie inmitten der mittelalterlichen Nachbarschaften in Partei und erleben Sie das legendäre Rennen der Barbiere
detected_errors.issue_explanation: Compounded catastrophic machine translation errors. 'Contrade' is translated to 'Laden-Bezirken' (shopping districts), 'in festa' to 'in Partei' (political party), and 'barberi' (racehorses) to 'Barbiere' (barbers). The sentence is absolute gibberish.
detected_errors.suggested_fix: Erleben Sie die historische Rivalität zwischen den Stadtteilen (Contraden), spazieren Sie durch die festlichen mittelalterlichen Viertel und erleben Sie das legendäre Pferderennen

detected_errors.target_text_snippet: Feiertage: Das Ritual des Eisernen Augusts
detected_errors.issue_explanation: Absurd literal mistranslation of a key Italian cultural holiday. 'Ferragosto' stems from 'Feriae Augusti'. The engine mistranslated 'Fer' as 'Ferro' (Iron), yielding 'Eiserner August', which is non-existent.

detected_errors.source_text_snippet: Spiaggia gremita e ombrelloni colorati durante la festa di mezza estate
detected_errors.target_text_snippet: Gepackter Strand und farbige Regenschirme während der Mittsommerparty
detected_errors.issue_explanation: Fails the specific target instruction for image alternative text. 'Ombrelloni' refers to beach sunshades ('Sonnenschirme'), not rain umbrellas ('Regenschirme'). Furthermore, 'gepackter Strand' is an unlocalized literal conversion.
detected_errors.suggested_fix: Ein belebter Strand und bunte Sonnenschirme während des Mittsommerfestes
